movies.title: The Finisher: Jasmin Paris and the Barkley Marathons
movies.review: 🤘 fuck yeah the girls 🤘 Great inspo to watch during a training block - Jasmin Paris you absolute legend.

movies.title: The Sheep Detectives
movies.review:
That was perfection and you can’t tell me otherwise.
Also pour one out for my homie Wilbur, my own winter lamb who sadly didn’t make it 🐑😭

movies.title: Steel Magnolias
movies.review: I never know what’s supposed to be funny on purpose and what’s only funny because I’m watching this 30 years later, ya know?

movies.title: I Saw the TV Glow
movies.review: I saw… a different movie to everyone else apparently cause wth was that. First 1/3rd was fun and interesting but absolutely lost me in the second half.

movies.title: Twinless
movies.review: Interesting premise but sort of felt exhausting as the audience.
